Class-Cleric-Blood — Female Half-Elf Cleric: 20
Strength: 11 (+0) Dexterity: 17 (+3) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 17 (+3) Wisdom: 15 (+2) Charisma: 15 (+2)
Background: Entertainer Alignment: Neutral Evil Deity: The Matron Of Ravens (LN)
Ability Boosts: Intelligence; Wisdom Experience: 599324/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes:
Half-Elf Ability Adjustment: +2 Charisma/Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Keen Mind: +1 Intelligence
Ability Boosts: 2 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Cleric (Divine Domain)
Feats: Elemental Adept (Thunder); Fortune's Grace; Keen Mind; Magic Initiate (Wizard); Savage Attacker Half-Elf Features: Darkvision; Fey Ancestry; Half-Elf Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Elvish; Choose 1 from any); Skill Versatility Cleric Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Shield); Blood Domain Spells; Blood Domain; Blood Puppet; Bloodletting Focus; Bonus Proficiencies (Blood Domain); Channel Divinity; Crimson Bond; Destroy Undead; Divine Domain; Divine Intervention; Divine Strike; Sanguine Recall; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from History, Insight, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Spellcasting (Cleric); Turn Undead; Vascular Corruption Aura; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons) Entertainer Features: By Popular Demand; Skill Proficiency (Acrobatics; Performance); Tool Proficiency (Disguise Kit; Choose 1 from any Musical Instrument)
Feature Notes:
Divine Domain: 1 selection
Darkvision: R60' Sees one light level better
Keen Mind: Always knows the direction of north and hours until sunrise or sunset/Can recall anything seen or heard during the past month
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +9 Insight: (wis) +2 Performance: (cha) +8
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +9 Investigation: (int) +3 Religion: (int) +9
Athletics: (str) +0 Medicine: (wis) +2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +3
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +3 Stealth: (dex) +3
History: (int) +9 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +2
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Arcana; History; Performance; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Disguise Kit; Lute
Languages: Common; Elvish; Halfling
Skill Notes:
Skill Versatility: Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from any)
By Popular Demand: Can receive welcome and lodging in exchange for performing
Combat
Hit Points: 94 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 16
Armor Proficiency: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Breastplate Shield: None Weapons: Handaxe (+6 1d6 S R20/60); Javelin (+6 1d6 P R30/120); Mace (+6 1d6 B); Unarmed Strike (+6 1 B)
Combat Notes:
Bonus Proficiencies (Blood Domain): Weapon Proficiency (Martial Weapons)
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +20
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Destroy Undead: Turning destroys undead up to CR 4
Divine Strike: Weapon inflicts +2d8 HP necrotic once per turn
Fortune's Grace: Can reroll an attack, ability, or saving throw, force a reroll on an attacker, or force a reroll on a save vs. a self spell, once per long rest
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 melee damage rolls once per turn
Turn Undead: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make undead flee (save DC 16 Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
Vascular Corruption Aura: 30' radius inflicts 3d6 HP necrotic and half healing on foes for 1 min once per long rest
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +8; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +3; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +0; Wisdom: +8
Save Notes: Fey Ancestry: Has advantage vs. charm and immunity to magical sleep
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 5; C: 22; W0: 2; W: 1 Spell Slots: C1: 4; C2: 3; C3: 3; C4: 3; C5: 3; C6: 2; C7: 2; C8: 1; C9: 1 Attack: C: +8; W: +9 Spell DC: C: 16; W: 17
Spells:
Alarm (W1 Abju): (Minute) R30' Entry into a 20' cube by a non-designated Tiny or larger creature triggers an audible or mental alarm for 8 hr [R]
Beacon Of Hope (C3 Abju): (Action) R30' Targets gain advantage on Wisdom and death saves and regain maximum hit points from healing for concentration up to 1 min
Blade Ward (W0 Abju): (Action) Self gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing weapon damage for 1 rd
Bless (C1 Ench): (Action) R30' 3 targets gain +1d4 on attacks and saves for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Blight (C4 [Blood Domain Spells] Necr): (Action) R30' Kills a nonmagical plant or inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic on a creature (save Constitution half; plant target has disadvantage on the save and suffers maximum damage on failure) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Blindness/Deafness (C2 Necr): (Action) R30' Inflicts a choice of blindness or deafness (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Chill Touch (W0 Necr): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP necrotic, and the target cannot regain hit points until the start of the next turn; undead also suffer disadvantage vs. self attack for 1 rd
Control Water (C4 Tran): (Action) R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Create Undead (C6 Necr): (Minute) R10' 3 corpses become ghouls that obey commands within 120' for 24 hr; additional castings extend the duration for 24 hr (+Level creates 4 ghouls; 5 ghouls, 2 ghasts, or 2 wights; or 6 ghouls, 3 ghasts, 3 wights, or 2 mummies at level 7, 8, or 9)
Cure Wounds (C1 Evoc): (Action) Touched regains 1d8+2 hit points (+Level restores +1d8 hit points)
Detect Poison And Disease (C1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and diseases for concentration up to 10 min; 3' of wood or dirt, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Dispel Evil And Good (C5 Abju): (Action) Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead suffer disadvantage on attacks vs. self for concentration up to 1 min; ending the spell early allows a successful spell attack on one of these creatures to return it to its home plane (save Charisma negates), or a touch to end an enchanted, frightened, or possessed condition inflicted by one of them
Dominate Person (C5 [Blood Domain Spells] Ench): (Action) R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8)
Etherealness (C7 Tran): (Action) Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr (+Level affects +2 or +5 willing targets at level 8 or 9)
False Life (C1 [Blood Domain Spells] Necr): (Action) Self gains 1d4+4 temporary hit points for 1 hr (+Level gives +5 temporary hit points)
Freedom Of Movement (C4 Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Geas (C5 Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 1 year or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Guardian Of Faith (C4 Conj): (Action) R30' 10' radius inflicts 20 HP radiant on foes (save Dexterity half) for 8 hr or until it has inflicted 60 HP
Guidance (C0 Divi): (Action) Willing touched gains +1d4 on 1 ability check within concentration up to 1 min
Guiding Bolt (C1 Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d6 HP radiant and gives advantage on the next attack on the target before the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Hallow (C5 Evoc): (24 Hours) 60' radius becomes warded against celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect (save Charisma negates)
Haste (C3 [Blood Domain Spells] Tran): (Action) R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 Armor Class, advantage on Dexterity saves, and an additional action to Attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object each turn for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of incapacitation afterward
Hold Monster (C5 [Blood Domain Spells] Ench): (Action) R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Person (C2 [Blood Domain Spells] Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Holy Aura (C8 Abju): (Action) Targets in a 30' radius gain advantage on saves, inflict disadvantage on attackers, and blind successful fiend and undead melee attackers (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Light (C0 Evoc): (Action) Touched object emits a 20' bright light (save Dexterity negates) for 1 hr
Mass Heal (C9 Evoc): (Action) R60' Targets regain 700 HP total and recover from blinded, deafened, and diseased
Planar Ally (C6 Conj): (10 Minutes) R60' Summons a servant of an otherworldly entity to bargain for aid
Protection From Poison (C2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from 1 poison and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Ray Of Enfeeblement (C2 [Blood Domain Spells] Necr): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts half damage with Strength weapons (save Constitution ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Resistance (C0 Abju): (Action) Touched gains +1d4 on 1 save within concentration up to 1 min
Resurrection (C7 Necr): (Hour) Restores life with full hit points to and removes nonmagical diseases, poisons, wounds, and maims from a willing touched 100-year-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest; use on a corpse dead 1 year or more inflicts on self loss of spellcasting and disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and saves until the next long rest
Revivify (C3 Necr): (Action) Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-min-old corpse
Sacred Flame (C0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Inflicts 4d8 HP radiant (save Dexterity negates), ignoring cover
Sleep (C1 [Blood Domain Spells] Ench): (Action) R90' 20' radius puts to sleep 5d8 hit points of creatures, starting with those with the least hit points, for 1 min; damage or shaking awakens (+Level affects +2d8 hit points of creatures)
Slow (C3 [Blood Domain Spells] Tran): (Action) R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action or attack per turn, and a 50% chance of a 1-rd delay on spell effects (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Spare The Dying (C0 Necr): (Action) Touched creature with 0 hit points becomes stable
Spiritual Weapon (C2 Evoc): (Bonus) R60' Creates a spectral weapon that inflicts 1d8+2 HP force and can move 20' and attack as a bonus action for 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP per 2 levels)
Stoneskin (C4 [Blood Domain Spells] Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Tongues (C3 Divi): (Action) Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Magic Notes:
Blood Puppet: R60' Can use Channel Divinity to force a Huge target to move half its Speed and attack a chosen target or to interact with an object (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Bloodletting Focus: Harming spells inflict +(spell level + 2) HP necrotic
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 3 times per short rest
Crimson Bond: Can use Channel Divinity to bond with a seen target or with a target's blood to learn its distance, direction, hit points, and conditions for concentration up to 1 hr; can share the target's sight or hearing for 2 min (save Constitution negates), suffering 2d6 HP necrotic and ending the bond
Divine Intervention: Has a 100% chance to gain help from The Matron Of Ravens once per week
Elemental Adept (Thunder): Spells that inflict thunder damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Sanguine Recall: Can recover up to 10 spell slot levels (level 5 maximum), suffering 1d8 HP necrotic per slot level, once per long rest
Spellcasting (Cleric): Can cast spells from the cleric spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
